vocab.example: Let's go through today's agenda before the meeting starts.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cùng xem qua chương trình họp trước khi bắt đầu.

vocab.example: Can you take the minutes for today's meeting?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể ghi biên bản cho cuộc họp hôm nay không?

vocab.example: Every action item needs a clear owner and deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Mỗi việc cần làm sau họp cần có người phụ trách và hạn rõ ràng.

vocab.example: I'd like to raise a point about the new schedule.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi muốn nêu ý kiến về lịch trình mới.

vocab.example: Our department meets every Monday morning.
vocab.example_vi: Phòng ban của chúng tôi họp vào mỗi sáng thứ Hai.

vocab.example: We need more headcount to finish this project on time.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi cần thêm nhân sự để hoàn thành dự án đúng hạn.

vocab.example: Let's set our priorities for this quarter first.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy xác định các ưu tiên cho quý này trước đã.

vocab.example: Let's wrap up the meeting in the next five minutes.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy kết thúc cuộc họp trong năm phút tới.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Good morning everyone. Let's go through today's agenda first.

lines.speaker: Trang
lines.text: Sure, I have a few items I'd like to raise a point about.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Great, go ahead whenever you're ready.

lines.speaker: Trang
lines.text: First, our department needs more headcount for the new project.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: I'll check with HR about the headcount request this week.

lines.speaker: Trang
lines.text: Thanks. Second, can we set clearer priorities for this quarter?

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Good point. Let's rank our top three priorities together now.

lines.speaker: Trang
lines.text: Can someone take the minutes for this meeting today?

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: I'll do it, and I'll list every action item clearly.

lines.speaker: Trang
lines.text: Perfect. Each action item should have a clear owner.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Agreed. Let's wrap up the meeting in five more minutes.

lines.speaker: Trang
lines.text: Sounds good, thanks everyone for a productive meeting.

questions.q: What is the first item Trang raises?
Who will take the minutes for the meeting?
What do they do in the last five minutes?

shadowing: Let's go through today's agenda before we start the meeting.
Can you please take the minutes for this whole meeting today?
Each action item from this meeting needs a clear owner.
I'd like to raise a point about our current project timeline.
Let's set our top priorities and wrap up the meeting soon.
